basic_details.job_title: JKSSB Recruitment 2026 - Online Application Postponed for 130 Electrician, Plumber and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Jammu & Kashmir Services Selection Board (JKSSB), Jammu/Srinagar
basic_details.post_name: Various Posts (Boiler Mechanic, Senior Horticulture Technician, Laboratory Assistant, Computer Assistant, Library Assistant, Electrician, and more)
basic_details.department: Agriculture Production, ARI & Trainings, Industries & Commerce, Higher Education, Home Department, Law Justice & Parliamentary Affairs
basic_details.short_information: Great opportunity for J&K Domicile candidates to join various state government departments through JKSSB Advertisement No. 04/2026. Apply online for 130 posts across 6 departments from 22-06-2026 to 21-07-2026.

important_dates.exam / written test date: To be notified separately on jkssb.nic.in

application_fee.details: The application fee is payable online only (Net Banking, Credit or Debit Cards) and is non-refundable. Applications without the prescribed fee shall be summarily rejected.

age_limit.details: Age is calculated as on 01-01-2026. The minimum age for all categories is that the candidate must not have been born after 01-01-2008. Standard age relaxations are applicable only to candidates applying against reserved vacancies.

qualification.details: Candidates must satisfy all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of application, i.e. 21-07-2026. Candidature is accepted provisionally and is subject to verification of documents at the Document Verification stage.
qualification.domicile: Candidate must be a Domicile of the Union Territory of Jammu & Kashmir and must possess a valid Domicile Certificate issued by the Competent Authority on or before 21-07-2026.
qualification.education_qualification: Varies by post as prescribed in Annexure-A of the notification.
qualification.experience: No essential experience specified for any advertised post.

vacancy_details.Department: Home Department (Forensic Science Laboratory) – UT Cadre
Law, Justice & Parliamentary Affairs – UT Cadre

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Three year Diploma in Mechanical Engineering from any recognized Institute
Three Years Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering with six months specialization in refrigeration
B.Sc. Horticulture or B.Sc. Agriculture with Horticulture as major subject from a recognized University
Matric with ITI in Electrical Trade
Matric with Science
Middle pass with ITI in the line
Graduate from a recognized University
Matric with at least one year ITI/Diploma in relevant printing/mechanical trade OR Matric with 7 years experience in printing field from Govt./recognized private institution
Matric with ITI in the respective trade
Diploma in Textile Technology from any recognized Institute
Matric with ITI in Weaving
ITI in Weaving
Matric with ITI in Dyeing
Degree/Diploma in Textile Technology from any recognized Institution
Diploma in Handloom/Wool/Wood Technology from a recognized Institute
Commerce Graduate (with diploma in Industrial Cooperative Management for Inspector Induscos)
Graduate from a recognized University
Bachelor of Computer Application OR Graduate with two years Diploma in Computer Science OR “O” Level certificate of DOEACC
Bachelor of Library Science from a recognized University
Matriculation with National Trade Test/ITI trained in the particular trade

Bachelor's Degree in Forensic Science OR Medical Subjects (Molecular Biology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Biotechnology/Genetics) OR Non-Medical Subjects (Electronics/Computer Science/IT) from UGC recognized University
Graduation from any UGC recognized University and Six months Certificate Course in Computer Application from recognized Institute
10+2 with Science (Maths or Biology as one of the subjects) from any recognized Board

vacancy_details.Post: Electrician Grade-II / Plumber Grade-II / Tailor (Prison Dept.)
vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: Minimum Matric and Maximum 10+2 with Diploma/Certificate in the relevant trade from ITI/Government recognized Institute
Matric with ITI in relevant trade

salary_details.pay_scale: Level SL1 to Level 6F (as per post)

selection_process: Selection for all advertised posts will be made on the basis of merit obtained in the Written/OMR Based Examination only. In case of a large number of applications
JKSSB reserves the right to apply shortlisting criteria as deemed appropriate.

The examination will consist of Objective Type Multiple Choice Questions set in English Language only. There will be negative marking of one-fourth of marks for each wrong answer. The date and venue of the examination shall be notified separately on the official website jkssb.nic.in.

Candidates shortlisted on the basis of written examination merit will be called for Document Verification. Original documents along with self-attested photocopies must be produced. Failure to appear or produce valid documents on the scheduled DV date shall lead to cancellation of candidature.
Selected candidates must be medically fit as per the standards prescribed by the Government of J&K.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the JKSSB official portal at https://jkssb.nic.in. Detailed instructions for filling the online application will be made available on the Board’s website separately. No other mode of application will be accepted.
Documents to be Uploaded at the time of Online Application:
Live photograph as required during online form filling.
Valid Domicile Certificate issued by the Competent Authority.
Matriculation/10th certificate as proof of date of birth and name.
Degree/Diploma/ITI certificate and marksheets for educational qualification proof (self-attested, max size 100 KB in PDF format).
Category Certificate (SC/ST/OBC/RBA/EWS/ALC/IB) in prescribed format valid as on cut-off date (max size 100 KB in PDF format), if applicable.
Ex-Servicemen certificate in Form XIV, if applicable.
Any other supporting document for claims made in the application.

Candidates must take a printout of the finally submitted online application and retain it for production at the time of Document Verification. No hard copy is required to be sent to JKSSB by post or email.
For assistance, candidates may use the JKSSB official website or contact ssbjk-grievance.jk.gov.in for grievances related to fee payment.
important_instructions: Applications once submitted cannot be modified or withdrawn under any circumstances. All eligibility conditions, including domicile and category certificate validity, will be determined as on 21-07-2026. Candidates must write their Name, Date of Birth, Father’s Name and Mother’s Name strictly as per their Matriculation Certificate. Only one online application per Item Number is permitted – multiple applications for the same post may lead to debarment. Use of mobile phones, smart watches, AI-enabled devices or any electronic gadgets is strictly prohibited at the examination venue. Candidates must carry two recent passport size colour photographs and original valid Photo-ID to the examination hall. The Board’s decision on all matters relating to eligibility, selection, and results shall be final and binding. Canvassing in any form or submission of fake/fabricated applications will lead to debarment and legal action. In-service candidates must route their application through the concerned Head of Department before the last date of Document Verification.

all_official_links.label: Download JKSSB Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is JKSSB Recruitment 2026 Advertisement No. 04/2026?
faq.answer: JKSSB Recruitment 2026 under Advertisement No. 04/2026 is a selection drive for 130 UT/Divisional/District Cadre posts in various departments of the J&K Government including Agriculture Production, ARI & Trainings, Industries & Commerce, Higher Education, Home, and Law Justice & Parliamentary Affairs. The notification invites online applications from eligible J&K domicile candidates for technical, clerical, and support staff posts with pay scales from Level SL1 to Level 6F.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in JKSSB Recruitment 2026 and in which departments?
faq.answer: A total of 130 vacancies have been notified across six departments: Agriculture Production Department (Animal Husbandry/Sheep Husbandry/Horticulture) ARI & Trainings Department (Govt. Press Srinagar, Ranbir Govt. Press Jammu) Industries & Commerce Department (Handicrafts & Handloom, Jammu & Kashmir) Higher Education Department (Director Colleges, Jammu & Kashmir) Home Department (Forensic Science Laboratory, Prison Department – UT Cadre) Law, Justice & Parliamentary Affairs Department (UT Cadre) The posts include Boiler Mechanic, Senior Horticulture Technician, Machineman, Binder, Head Weaver, Computer Assistant, Library Assistant, Laboratory Assistant, Electrician Grade-II, Plumber Grade-II, Tailor, and others.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for JKSSB Recruitment 2026 (Advt. 04/2026)?
faq.answer: Date of Advertisement: 25 May 2026 Opening of Online Application: 22 June 2026 Last Date for Online Application (cut-off date): 21 July 2026 Date for determining eligibility (qualification, age, domicile, category): 21 July 2026

faq.question: Q4. Who is eligible to apply for JKSSB Recruitment 2026 – domicile and qualification?
faq.answer: Only domiciles of the Union Territory of Jammu & Kashmir with a valid domicile certificate issued by the competent authority on or before 21-07-2026 are eligible. Educational qualification is post-specific, ranging from 10+2, Matric + ITI, Diploma in Engineering/Technology, Graduate, B.Lib, BCA/Graduate with Computer Diploma, B.Sc. (Forensic/Medical/Non-Medical), etc., as detailed in the notification for each Item Number.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for JKSSB Recruitment 2026 as on 01-01-2026?
faq.answer: Maximum age limits (not born before the date given) are: Open Merit (OM): 40 years (01-01-1986 to 01-01-2008) SC/ST/RBA/ALC/IB/EWS/OBC: 43 years (01-01-1983 to 01-01-2008) PwBD: 42 years (01-01-1984 to 01-01-2008) Ex-Servicemen (ESM): 48 years (01-01-1978 to 01-01-2008)

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for JKSSB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on merit in a Written/OMR-based objective examination only. The exam will consist of Multiple Choice Questions (MCQs) in English, and there will be negative marking of 1/4th of the marks for each wrong answer. After the written exam, shortlisted candidates will undergo Document Verification, and finally a medical fitness check as per J&K Government norms.

faq.question: Q7. Who should not apply for JKSSB Advertisement 04/2026?
faq.answer: You should not apply if: You are not a domicile of J&K or do not possess a valid domicile certificate by 21-07-2026. You do not have the exact essential qualification for the specific post as per the notification. You belong to OBC Creamy Layer but want OBC reservation benefits. You cannot produce original certificates at Document Verification, or you enter incorrect personal details (name, DOB, parent’s name) differing from Matric certificate. You are above the maximum age limit for your category as on 01-01-2026.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply online for JKSSB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online only through jkssb.nic.in during 22-06-2026 to 21-07-2026 Postponed. The steps are: Register/Login on the JKSSB portal. Fill in personal, academic, and category details correctly as per your Matric certificate and original documents. Upload live photograph, scanned signature, domicile, qualification, category and other certificates in the prescribed size and format. Pay the online application fee. Submit the form and take a printout of the final application for Document Verification.

title: JKSSB Recruitment 2026 - Online Application Postponed for 130 Electrician, Plumber and More Posts
